title: Carpet Variants
description: A mod that gives you the ability to place carpets on walls and ceilings.
body:
Expand your decorative possibilities in Minecraft with **Carpet Variants**. This mod allows you to place carpets not only on floors but also on walls and ceilings. Create unique interiors and highlight the style of your home by using carpets to decorate any surface.
![Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/8lmADOK.png)
